en_title: The Odyssey Director Christopher Nolan Says 'AI Slop' Is Being 'Utterly Rejected' By Younger Audiences
cn_title: 《奥德赛》导演克里斯托弗·诺兰：年轻观众拒绝AI垃圾
subtitle: 真实感正在回归
opus_summary: 《奥德赛》导演克里斯托弗·诺兰表示，年轻观众会迅速识别并严厉拒绝所谓的「AI垃圾」。他认为，观众正重新关注更具触感、更真实的叙事形式；其新片将于7月17日上映，并大量采用实际特效。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey director Christopher Nolan has offered his thoughts on the "immediate and harsh" judgment of "AI slop" from younger audiences.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》导演克里斯托弗·诺兰谈到了年轻观众对「AI垃圾」作出的「即时而严厉」的评判。

paragraphs.en: The filmmaker behind The Dark Knight trilogy and Oppenheimer opened up about the response to the controversial technology during an interview with The Telegraph . With just one week to go until his adaptation of the Greek epic comes to theaters, he spoke about how moviegoers have recently shown up for success stories like Backrooms and Obsession .
paragraphs.cn: 《黑暗骑士》三部曲和《奥本海默》的导演在接受《每日电讯报》采访时，谈到了人们对这项争议技术的反应。他将古希腊史诗改编成的电影还有一周就要上映，并谈到观众近期为何会支持《后室》和《Obsession》这样的成功作品。

paragraphs.en: "This is why I never bought into the arguments that young audiences’ attention spans are too fried to enjoy a three-hour Greek epic," Nolan said, referencing his version of The Odyssey. "Those films are so mysterious and ruminative. I mean, parts of Backrooms are like David Lynch at his most obscure. And yet young people can’t get enough of them."
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰在提到自己的《奥德赛》时说：「所以我从来不相信‘年轻观众的注意力已经糟糕到无法欣赏三小时希腊史诗’这种说法。这些电影神秘而耐人寻味。我的意思是，《后室》的一些部分就像处于最晦涩状态的David Lynch。然而年轻人仍然对它们欲罢不能。」

paragraphs.en: Both low-budget horror films, which in the weeks following their respective premieres, received praise for their reliance on practical effects and sets. As artificial intelligence continues to make heads spin online, Nolan commented on why he believes younger audiences are growing increasingly disinterested in virtual environments.
paragraphs.cn: 这两部低成本恐怖片在各自首映后的几周里，都因依赖实际特效和实体布景而获得好评。随着人工智能继续在网络上引发热议，诺兰谈到了他认为年轻观众越来越不喜欢虚拟环境的原因。

paragraphs.en: "I’ve never seen a more rapid wholesale dismissal of a supposedly foundational jump in technology in my lifetime," he said. "So much energy has been expended on bringing in AI, but if you look at that generation’s reaction, they’re utterly rejecting it."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「我这辈子从未见过人们如此迅速、全面地否定一项被认为具有基础性意义的技术飞跃。人们投入了如此多精力引入AI，但如果观察那一代人的反应，就会发现他们彻底拒绝了它。」

paragraphs.en: Filmmakers like James Cameron , Seth Rogen , and Gore Verbinski have publicly shared their fears regarding an AI future in the past. While some are more hesitant than others, Nolan says it's younger viewers who may be more wary than anyone. His children, who are in their late teens and early 20s, seem to be especially critical.
paragraphs.cn: James Cameron、Seth Rogen和Gore Verbinski等电影人过去都曾公开表达对AI未来的担忧。诺兰表示，虽然有些人比其他人更犹豫，但年轻观众可能比任何人都更警惕。他的孩子年龄在十几岁后期到20岁出头之间，似乎尤其批判AI。

paragraphs.en: "Their judgment of AI slop has been immediate and harsh," Nolan continued. "They see it for what it is very quickly – and it’s much easier for them to identify it, because it grew out of an online world they know really well. And while that doesn’t mean that every aspect of the technology is useless or meaningless, in film-making it’s hitting at exactly the wrong time. After years of driving towards heavily virtual environments, we’re seeing a renewed interest in more tactile, more real forms of storytelling."
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰继续说道：「他们对AI垃圾的判断既即时又严厉。他们很快就能看清它的本质，也更容易识别它，因为这种东西生长于他们非常熟悉的网络世界。这并不意味着这项技术的每个方面都无用或毫无意义，但在电影制作中，它偏偏在最不合适的时间冲击了行业。在多年追求高度虚拟化环境之后，我们看到人们重新对更具触感、更真实的叙事形式产生兴趣。」

paragraphs.en: When The Odyssey premieres July 17, 2026, it will feature more than a few practical effects. Maybe the most famous example, as outlined by star Matt Damon, will be a 60-foot Cyclops puppet . Nolan and the rest of the movie's crew filmed their recreation of the mythological giant in Zeus' believed birthplace, Psychro Cave.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》将于2026年7月17日上映，片中会使用大量实际特效。正如主演Matt Damon介绍的那样，最著名的例子或许是一尊60英尺高的独眼巨人木偶。诺兰和剧组在被认为是宙斯出生地的Psychro Cave拍摄了这头神话巨人的再现。

paragraphs.en: For more on Nolan's new movie, you can read about how he fought back against the "cultural prejudices" of the ancient world while making The Odyssey . Meanwhile, it was recently announced that Michael Caine's voice was reproduced using AI to narrate an audiobook version of the story .
paragraphs.cn: 关于诺兰新片的更多内容，可以阅读他在制作《奥德赛》时如何反击古代世界「文化偏见」的报道。与此同时，近期有消息称，迈克尔·Caine的声音经过AI复现，将用于讲述这部作品的有声书版本。

pending_dict.note: 地点暂无稳定中文名，保留英文
